title: Implement spatial indexes and location lifecycle cleanup
summary: Implement location stores and bounded spatial indexes for map cells, chunks and regions with cleanup on movement, despawn and destroy.
acceptance: Location updates maintain exactly one map or container membership per entity
Spatial queries use indexed cells, chunks or regions and never scan all entities for pawn thinking
Destroy/despawn cleanup removes index, reservation and occupancy references through explicit lifecycle hooks
50k indexed empty or inert entities do not create sustained queue or memory growth
